languages.text: [Бесцеремонно пройтись по Патенту] "Хватит трястись. Это просто древняя бумажка".
[Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."
languages.original_text: [Бесцеремонно пройтись по Патенту] "Хватит трястись. Это просто древняя бумажка".

traits.locale_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."
[Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant, wiping your feet on the signature at the bottom of the document] "Enough quaking, it's just an old writ."
[Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant, wiping your feet on the signature at the bottom of the document] "Enough quaking, it's just an old writ."
[Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."

languages.text: [保証書を踏んで、署名部分で足跡を消す]「もう震えなくていいよ、ただの古い判決だ」
languages.original_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant, wiping your feet on the signature at the bottom of the document] "Enough quaking, it's just an old writ."

traits.locale_text: 「もう震えなくていいよ、ただの古い判決だ」と、保証書を踏んで、署名部分で足跡を消す。

languages.text: [Pisar la Patente con indiferencia] «Basta de temblequeos, es solo una vieja escritura».
languages.original_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."

traits.locale_text: [Pisar la Patente con indiferencia] «Basta de temblequeos, es solo una vieja escritura».

languages.text: [Ohne Umschweife über den Handelsbrief gehen] "Genug geredet. Das ist nur ein altes Stück Papier."
languages.original_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."

traits.locale_text: [Ohne Umschweife über den Handelsbrief gehen] "Genug geredet. Das ist nur ein altes Stück Papier."

languages.text: [Marcher sans cérémonie sur la lettre de marque] « Cessez de pleurnicher, ce n'est qu'un vieux bout de papier. »
languages.original_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."

traits.locale_text: [Marcher sans cérémonie sur la lettre de marque] « Cessez de pleurnicher, ce n'est qu'un vieux bout de papier. »

languages.text: 【毫不客气地从贸易授状上踩过去】“别哆嗦了。不过是一张老掉牙的敕令而已。”
languages.original_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."

traits.locale_text: 【毫不客气地从贸易授状上踩过去】“别哆嗦了。不过是一张老掉牙的敕令而已。”

languages.text: [Törene yakışmayan bir tavırla Ruhsatname'nin üzerinde yürü] "Titremeyi kesin, alt tarafı eski bir ferman."
languages.original_text: [Walk unceremoniously over the Warrant] "Enough quaking. It's just an old writ."
